title: AX Kill Types
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM Bounty WHERE VictimFaction = 'Thargoid' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Target AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Bounty WHERE VictimFaction = 'Thargoid' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Target ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Thargoid vessel(s) destroyed during the report period. The difference between a Cyclops and a Hydra is the difference between a challenging fight and a career-defining engagement — this chart shows how far up the interceptor threat scale you've climbed and whether scouts or interceptors dominate your kill board.
details.help: Bounty Target is the Thargoid vessel type (e.g., Cyclops, Basilisk, Medusa, Hydra, Scout). total drives the title.

tagLines: AX kill classification breakdown compiled. Thargoid vessel type engagement data archived.
Scouts die in seconds. A Hydra can take half an hour and kill you three times. The chart shows how brave you were.
Each interceptor variant is a step up in danger. The ones at the top of this chart cost you.
